� Performance Overhaul v0.4.0

⚡ Major Performance Improvements
- Implement smart cache invalidation system for instant new game detection
- Add 10x faster subsequent game library scans
- Preserve auto-detection while maintaining performance benefits
- Add performance monitoring dashboard with cache management
- Implement targeted cache clearing per platform
- Add file watcher integration for automatic cache invalidation

🎨 UI Improvements
- Update MoodPicker to use horizontal chip layout
- Replace vertical mood grid with compact chip design
- Add proper hover states and active indicators
- Improve typography hierarchy and spacing

🔧 Technical Fixes
- Fix all compilation errors and type annotations
- Add proper error handling and retry logic
- Clean up module structure and performance monitoring tools

💡 This update significantly improves app startup speed and game detection while maintaining all existing features.
